sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61616" key="laqro/pinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθρό-πῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61616.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinking secretly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.216.1</biblScope> </bibl> cod.</sense> </entryFree>
